hooks.command: node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on('data', d=>chunks.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end', ()=>{ const i=JSON.parse(chunks.join('').replace(/^﻿/,'')); const f=(i.tool_input||{}).file_path||(i.tool_response||{}).filePath||''; if(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(f)){ const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try { console.log('Running lint...'); execSync('npm run lint', {stdio:'inherit'}); console.log('Running build...'); execSync('npm run build', {stdio:'inherit'}); } catch(e){ process.exit(1); } } });"
